name: AppDynamics, Inc. (Acquired by Cisco Systems, Inc.)

faq.q: How many GCC centers does AppDynamics operate in India?
faq.a: AppDynamics operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does AppDynamics have GCC centers in?
faq.a: AppDynamics's India GCC presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does AppDynamics run in India?
faq.a: AppDynamics runs R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at AppDynamics's India GCCs?
faq.a: AppDynamics's India centers employ in the 51 to 100 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads AppDynamics's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 4 leaders at AppDynamics's India centers, across IT and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.
